roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S ADD TO CALENDAR RE TO SET DISPO FILED

/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:THE DA'S OR PAROLE'S MOTION TO AMEND THE PETITION TO ALLEGE VIOLATION #3- FAILURE TO FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS, IS GRANTED,/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATION #3 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:150 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  48  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:THE COURT DISMISSES VIOLATIONS #1 & #2 FOR LACK OF EVIDENCE,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO:07-07-14,/X:THE COURT VACATES THE 10-21-14 DATE,/ /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TOREPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC 3000,08//PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND THE COURT FINDS PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/CONTD:STATUS OF FELONY/
/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC 3000,08//PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS AND THE COURT FINDS PROBABLE CAUSE,/NB/CONTD:STATUS OF FELONY/
/CAL:DA 3056 PTR/DAWT/CONTD:FURTHER PROCEEDINGS RE: DA 3056 PTR AND STATUS OF FELONY 14019012 INDEPT 31/DOPC/
